feed.title: ZhgChgLi (Harry Li)
feed.subtitle: An iOS, web, and automation developer from Taiwan 🇹🇼 who also loves sharing, traveling, and writing.

entry.title: iOS Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles Explained｜Fastlane Match for Unified Certificate Management in CI/CD

link.title: iOS Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles Explained｜Fastlane Match for Unified Certificate Management in CI/CD

entry.summary: Discover how to streamline iOS certificate issuance and management using Fastlane Match, integrating Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles seamlessly into your CI/CD pipeline for efficient app deployment.

entry.title: Medium API Data Scraping｜Bypass Cloudflare Verification Efficiently

link.title: Medium API Data Scraping｜Bypass Cloudflare Verification Efficiently

entry.summary: Discover how to efficiently scrape data from Medium's GraphQL Private API, backup articles, and bypass Cloudflare verification blocks to ensure uninterrupted data access and reliable content backup.

entry.title: App Store Connect API Webhook｜Automate CI/CD Workflows Seamlessly

link.title: App Store Connect API Webhook｜Automate CI/CD Workflows Seamlessly

entry.summary: Developers facing manual deployment delays can integrate App Store Connect API Webhooks to automate CI/CD pipelines, reducing errors and accelerating app releases efficiently.
